codeReview.summary: The implementation perfectly matches the feature description. The Sardius backend was successfully scaffolded and added to the workspace as @emerald/api. The docker-compose ports were successfully remapped to 5434 and 5435 to avoid conflicts. Environment examples and root scripts were added correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered that the generated Sardius scaffold misses the `google-auth-library` dependency and requires a manual `prisma generate` step before the dev server can start. This was correctly added to the skill feedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `skillFeedback.suggestedChanges` and verification step 7 (`pnpm ... add google-auth-library`).

summary: Review passed. Scaffold generated and integrated successfully.
